Localization.Description: The rule detects the use of security analysis tools on Unix hosts

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The use of security analysis tool for Unix systems is detected on host {event_src.host}. Artifact: command line ({alert.regex_match}). Description: {datafield7}.
The use of security analysis tool for Unix systems is detected on host {event_src.host}. Artifact: file name ({object.process.name}). Description: {datafield7}.
